name: Even Split
based_on: Plates by Splitwise / 'Tip Calculator & Bill Split' — a restaurant bill splitter that computes tip on the pre-tax amount and divides per person.
summary: A fast single-file bill-and-tip splitter: enter the bill, pick a tip percentage, set the number of people, and instantly see tip, tax handling, total, and a clean per-person amount with an optional round-up.
sections: Separate tax field so tip is calculated on the pre-tax bill
setup_questions: What's your default tip percentage and which presets should the buttons show (e.g. 15 / 18 / 20 / 25)?
What currency and locale should amounts use (e.g. USD $, EUR €)?
Should tip be calculated on the pre-tax or post-tax amount by default?
Typical party size to default to, and should it offer a 'round up each person' option?
